texto: You can’t fight like this. You’re not prepared and you are in no means in control of your emotions.”
autor: Blood rushed to her head. “Fuck you!”
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Blood rushed to her head. “Fuck you!”: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “You can’t fight like this. You’re not prepared and you are in no means in control of your emotions.”” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, my-point-exactly, fight pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
